cards.title: Web Development
cards.body: Learning frontend and backend fundamentals while building real projects from scratch.

cards.title: Node.js
cards.body: Learning backend fundamentals, routing, servers, and how web applications work behind the scenes.

cards.title: abhibuilds.com
cards.body: Building my personal website publicly while documenting every lesson, challenge, and improvement.

cards.title: YouTube + LinkedIn
cards.body: Sharing tutorials, lessons, mistakes, and progress to build accountability and communication skills.

cards.title: Developer + Builder
cards.body: Build useful products, improve my problem-solving skills, document the journey publicly, and eventually create systems that help people.
